features.name: Metabolic Pathway Visualization
features.description: Interactive application for visualizing and exploring metabolic pathway maps, including a built-in E. coli core metabolism map with Escher-style rendering and redundant-edge pruning.
features.evidence_summary: The MetabolicGraph app function is the entry point for visualization; changelog entries confirm E. coli map addition, edge-removal tuning, and performance work all target the rendering layer.

features.name: Escher Map File Viewer
features.description: Datagrok file-browser integration that opens Escher-format JSON metabolic map files directly in a dedicated view, with a validity-check function to detect applicable files.
features.evidence_summary: EscherFileViewer and escherFileViewerCheck share the 'Escher' name prefix and together implement the fileViewer role for JSON metabolic maps.

features.name: Flux Balance Analysis
features.description: Constraint-based metabolic modeling using a WebAssembly GLPK solver to compute FBA solutions and extreme points of the flux polytope.
features.evidence_summary: Two changelog entries explicitly name GLPK and FBA/Extreme points as a distinct solver capability introduced across versions 1.0.1 and 1.1.0.

features.name: Metabolic Flux Sampling
features.description: Server-side OptGP-based stochastic sampling of the metabolic flux space, returning binned sample distributions via a configurable sampling dialog.
features.evidence_summary: OptGpSampling script directly implements the sampling backend, and the changelog confirms a dedicated sampling dialog with configurable options.
